experiments.name: Detection Optimization: CISA Adds Exploited SharePoint RCE Zero-Day CVE-20
experiments.hypothesis: Narrow detection rules reduce false positives without missing true threats

variant_a.name: Broad Detection
variant_a.description: Matches any related IOC or technique indicator
variant_a.detection_logic: selection: any technique OR any CVE mention

variant_b.name: Precise Detection
variant_b.detection_logic: selection: (technique AND CVE) OR (IOC AND actor_tag)
